commands:
printf "[Unit]
Description=Ethnic Threads Scraper Worker
After=network.target

[Service]
User=ubuntu
WorkingDirectory=/home/ubuntu/garment-web-scraper
Environment=AWS_ACCESS_KEY_ID=AKIATUIA474SNM6ZIUXQ
Environment=AWS_SECRET_ACCESS_KEY=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
Environment=AWS_DEFAULT_REGION=ap-south-1
Environment=AWS_S3_BUCKET=ethnic-threads-showcase-ap-south-1
ExecStart=/home/ubuntu/garment-web-scraper/venv/bin/python3 -m scraper.worker --host 0.0.0.0 --port 8765
Restart=always
RestartSec=5

[Install]
WantedBy=multi-user.target
" | sudo tee /etc/systemd/system/scraper-worker.service
